title: Race phase bins and smooth progress
summary: Represent race phase with both continuous and thresholded progress features.
rationale: Pit-stop timing is phase-dependent: early stops, middle-window stops, and final stops have different meanings. Race phase features were part of most stronger preprocessing stacks.
implementation_hint: Add `RaceProgress` polynomial terms, estimated laps remaining, early/mid/late/final-quarter/final-ten-laps indicators, and interactions between phase flags and tyre-life or finish-window pressure.
expected_effect: Small to medium ROC AUC gain with high confidence.
risk: Thresholds can be redundant with tree models; keep only a few interpretable phase bins and continuous features.
